items.title: This Magnificent Stock Has Made Many Millionaires -- and Could Make More
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Amazon has been a highly successful investment, delivering a 233,100% gain since its IPO in 1997. The company's e-commerce and cloud computing (AWS) businesses have significant growth potential, and its profitability continues to improve. While the stock may not be considered a 'growth story' anymore, it could still be a worthwhile investment given its long-term prospects.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Amazon's impressive historical performance, significant growth potential in its core businesses, and improving profitability, suggesting it is still a worthwhile investment despite its large size.
